title: Fluffy Fancy Clouds
description: Uses core shaders to enhance the vanilla Minecraft clouds, no mods required!
body:
![Fluffy Fancy Clouds title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f127cd72295cbbdbfa57c63f592c371caa818c16.png)

I've personally always found clouds in Minecraft to be incredibly boring and non-whimsical, so I tried to fix that! Introducing: **Fluffy Fancy Clouds**.

![View of the fluffy clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddf8ff216a20296bd227c5d221f634acb3974c3f.png)

This resource pack aims to improve the visual fidelity of minecraft clouds through vanilla core shaders. It uses a simple gradient and blurring technique to hopefully achieve much softer, denser, and of course fluffier looking clouds. 

![A comparison between Vanilla clouds on the left, and Fluffy Fancy Clouds on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ec02bfc2da7e254a99e5c60f8e2006bfc1d70a0.png)

_Requires Fancy Clouds to be enabled!_

_(Optional) Enable Improved Transparency for full effect._

#

![Sub header reading "Incompatibilities"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f6db8da00f1cacdd1f293e966fa6da2a0652ec0.png)

This pack will likely be incompatible with Iris Shaderpacks, as well as any resource packs that alter vanilla clouds or transparency.fsh.

<details>
<summary>Modified Files</summary>
  
rendertype_clouds.vsh
  
rendertype_clouds.fsh

transparency.fsh

</details>

<details>
  
<summary>Added Files</summary>

cloudblur.fsh

</details>

#

![Sub header reading "Future"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18e1fb6d38f3f3d5104ed50f87477c05468d8e37.png)

I'm currently trying to work on downporting this pack for older versions as well, so be on the lookout if you're still in the past! :)

> Created by Water_puddle
